items.title: High Speed 2 to Cost up to £103 Billion After More Delays
items.summary: The UK’s High Speed 2 rail line will cost between £87.7 billion ($117 billion) and £102.7 billion and open by 2036 at the earliest, Transport Secretary Heidi Alexander said, revealing the latest budget increase and delay to the troubled project.

items.title: French Grid Keeps Nuclear Reactors Online Despite Solar Surge
items.summary: France’s grid operator is keeping extra nuclear reactors online to keep the system stable despite strong solar power generation, contributing to a supply surplus and deeply discounted electricity prices.

items.title: Jeff Currie Says AI Boom Sets Up Commodities for Decade-Long Run
